enonce.texte: Complete the sentences with the correct word from the box: Independence Day, Youth Day, National Day, celebrate, customs.

questions.texte: Fill in the blanks with the correct word.
questions.reponse: 1. Independence Day; 2. National Day; 3. Youth Day; 4. celebrate; 5. customs

sousQuestions.texte: Cameroon's ______ is on January 1st.
The unification of Cameroon is celebrated on ______.
______ is on February 11th and honors the youth.
People ______ holidays with parades and special food.
Traditional dress and special food are important ______ during holidays.

enonce.texte: Read the description and match each holiday to its correct date and activity.
images: A drawing of people watching fireworks with the caption 'January 1st'
A drawing of students marching in a parade with the caption 'February 11th'
A drawing of a flag raising ceremony with the caption 'May 20th'

questions.texte: Match the holiday to its date and activity.
questions.reponse: 1. Independence Day - January 1st - fireworks; 2. Youth Day - February 11th - student parades; 3. National Day - May 20th - flag raising

sousQuestions.texte: Independence Day is celebrated on ______.
The holiday with student parades is ______.
On National Day, there is a ______ ceremony.

enonce.texte:
Read the text about Youth Day and answer the questions.

Youth Day in Cameroon

Youth Day is celebrated on February 11th. On this day, students march in parades. They wear their school uniforms. There are speeches about the importance of young people. Families often have special meals together. It is a day to honor the youth of Cameroon.

questions.texte: Answer the questions about Youth Day.
questions.reponse: 1. February 11th; 2. Students march in parades; 3. They wear school uniforms; 4. Speeches about the importance of young people; 5. To honor the youth of Cameroon

sousQuestions.texte: When is Youth Day celebrated?
What do students do on Youth Day?
What do students wear during the parade?
What kind of speeches are given?
sousQuestions.reponse: Speeches about the importance of young people.

sousQuestions.texte: Why is Youth Day celebrated?
sousQuestions.reponse: To honor the youth of Cameroon.

enonce.texte: Use the information below to write a short description of Independence Day. Include the name, date, activities, food, and clothes.

questions.reponse: Example: Independence Day is celebrated on January 1st. People watch fireworks and attend ceremonies. Families eat special food like ndolé and poulet DG. People wear traditional clothes. It is a day of joy for all Cameroonians.

sousQuestions.texte: What is the name of the holiday?
When is it celebrated?
What activities do people do?
sousQuestions.reponse: They watch fireworks and attend ceremonies.

sousQuestions.texte: What food do they eat?
sousQuestions.reponse: They eat ndolé and poulet DG.

sousQuestions.texte: What do people wear?

intitule: Verb Practice - Present and Past Forms

enonce.texte: Complete the sentences with the correct form of the verb in brackets (present or past).

sousQuestions.texte: Every year, we ______ (celebrate) National Day.
Last year, they ______ (dance) at the ceremony.
We always ______ (eat) special food on holidays.
My mother ______ (wear) a traditional dress yesterday.
He ______ (watch) the parade every year.

enonce.texte:
You are a member of your school's Culture Club. You need to write a short announcement for a celebration of National Day. Write 5 sentences describing what will happen.

Include:

  • The date of the celebration
  • Activities planned
  • Food and drinks
  • What people should wear

questions.texte: Write an announcement for the National Day celebration.
questions.reponse: Example: The Culture Club will celebrate National Day on May 20th. There will be a flag-raising ceremony at 8 am. Students will dance and sing the national anthem. We will serve traditional food like ndolé and rice. Please wear your school uniform or traditional clothes.

sousQuestions.texte: When is the celebration?
What activities are planned?
sousQuestions.reponse: A flag-raising ceremony, dancing, and singing.

sousQuestions.texte: What food will be served?
What should people wear?

enonce.texte:
Read the information about Independence Day and National Day. Then write 5 sentences comparing the two holidays.

Independence Day: January 1st, fireworks, family gatherings, traditional food.

National Day: May 20th, flag-raising ceremonies, parades, political speeches.

questions.texte: Compare Independence Day and National Day.
questions.reponse: Example: Independence Day is on January 1st, but National Day is on May 20th. Independence Day has fireworks, while National Day has flag-raising ceremonies. Families gather on Independence Day, but on National Day, there are parades. Traditional food is eaten on Independence Day. Political speeches are given on National Day.

sousQuestions.texte: What is the date of Independence Day?
What is the date of National Day?
What activity is special on Independence Day?
What activity is special on National Day?
What is similar about both holidays?
sousQuestions.reponse: Both are national holidays in Cameroon and involve celebrations.

enonce.texte: Imagine you are on holiday in a different region of Cameroon. Write a short postcard message to your friend. Describe what you are doing for the holiday. Use at least 5 sentences.

questions.texte: Write a postcard message about your holiday.
questions.reponse: Example: Dear Marie, I am in Yaoundé for National Day. The celebrations are wonderful! I saw a big parade with many people. Everyone is wearing beautiful clothes. We ate delicious food. I wish you were here! Your friend, Jean.

sousQuestions.texte: Where are you?
What holiday are you celebrating?
What did you see?
What are people wearing?
What did you eat?

enonce.texte: Create a greeting card for Youth Day. Write a message inside the card to a young person. Use expressions like 'I wish you', 'Happy Youth Day', and 'I hope you'. Include 5 sentences.
images: A blank greeting card with a drawing of a student and a flag

questions.texte: Write a greeting card message for Youth Day.
questions.reponse: Example: Happy Youth Day! I wish you a day full of joy. I hope you enjoy the celebrations. Remember that young people are the future of Cameroon. I wish you success in your studies. Yours sincerely, your friend.

sousQuestions.texte: What is the occasion?
What is your wish for the person?
sousQuestions.reponse: A day full of joy and success in studies.

sousQuestions.texte: What message do you have about young people?
sousQuestions.reponse: They are the future of Cameroon.
